description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and essentials in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish handbag from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this bag anywhere and add style to any casual outfit. Product Details Midnight blue tote bag with light blue flowers and green thread detailing on the edges Two short handles One main compartment with transparent, plastic side pocket which has a Velcro closure The bag has a rubber finish on the outside and a plastic lining for all the compartments One small zippered compartment at the back Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a damp cloth when necessary Size Height: 31 cm Width: 40 cm Depth: 20 cm
